message: 🌱 Add etcd: go get error for 3.4.0 mission (#593)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-11154-go-get-error-for-3-4-0",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: go get error for 3.4.0",
+    "description": "go get error for 3.4.0. This issue affects 37+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify etcd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your etcd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n etcd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\n```\ngo get go.etcd.io/etcd.4.0\ngo: finding golang.org/x/net master\ngo: finding go.etcd.io/etcd v3.4.0\ngo: finding go.etcd.io/etcd v3.4.0\ngo get go.etcd.io/etcd.4.0: go.etcd.io/etcd.4.0: invalid version: module contains a go.mod file, so major"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for go get error for 3.4.0",
+        "description": "This is an attempt to resolve #11154 by completing the migration to Go\nmodules. This is a breaking change to anyone using Go older than 1.11.\n\nOn Go 1.11 or newer, with or without modules, the \"go.etcd.io/etcd\"\nimport path should still work.\n\nUsers that have already adopted modules are then\n```yaml\ngit clone --branch v3.4.3 https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd.git\ncd etcd\necho -n v0.0.0-\nTZ=UTC git --no-pager show \\\n  --quiet \\\n  --abbrev=12 \\\n  --date='format-local:%Y%m%d%H%M%S' \\\n  --format=\"%cd-%h\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade etcd to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade etcd:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade etcd etcd/etcd --namespace etcd\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd\nhelm list -n etcd\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm go get error for 3.4.0 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n etcd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is an attempt to resolve #11154 by completing the migration to Go\nmodules. This is a breaking change to anyone using Go older than 1.11.\n\nOn Go 1.11 or newer, with or without modules, the \"go.etcd.io/etcd\"\nimport path should still work.\n\nUsers that have already adopted modules are then encouraged to use the\nnew, versioned import path \"go.etcd.io/etcd/v3\" in their projects.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "git clone --branch v3.4.3 https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd.git\ncd etcd\necho -n v0.0.0-\nTZ=UTC git --no-pager show \\\n  --quiet \\\n  --abbrev=12 \\\n  --date='format-local:%Y%m%d%H%M%S' \\\n  --format=\"%cd-%h\"",
+        "import ( ...\n\t\"github.com/etcd-io/etcd/clientv3\"\n...)",
+        "cli, err := clientv3.New(clientv3.Config{\n\t\tEndpoints:   []string{\"http://127.0.0.1:2379\"},\n\t\tDialTimeout: 5 * time.Second,\n\t})..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "etcd",
+      "graduated",
+      "orchestration",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "etcd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/11154",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/pull/11221"
+    },
+    "reactions": 37,
+    "comments": 48,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T03:22:06.124Z",
